# ScalexStore

> Online footwear store. Sneakers, running shoes, boots, and sandals.
> Full machine-readable catalog available as JSON at /products.json

## Products

- [Nike Air Max 270](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=1): sneakers, $129.99 — The Nike Air Max 270 delivers visible cushioning under every step with a large Air unit in the heel — the biggest in Nike running history.
- [Adidas Stan Smith](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=2): sneakers, $89.99 — A timeless tennis-inspired silhouette that has transcended sport and become a global style icon.
- [Converse Chuck Taylor All Star](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=3): sneakers, $65.00 — The Chuck Taylor All Star is the world's most iconic sneaker — a canvas high-top that's been a cultural staple since 1917.
- [New Balance 574](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=4): sneakers, $79.99 — The New Balance 574 is a retro-running icon reborn for everyday comfort.
- [Vans Old Skool](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=5): sneakers, $69.99 — The Vans Old Skool was the first shoe to feature the iconic Vans side stripe — and it's been a skate and street staple ever since.
- [Nike React Infinity Run Flyknit](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=6): running, $159.99 — Designed to keep you running, the Nike React Infinity Run is built to help reduce injury and keep you on the road.
- [Adidas Ultraboost 22](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=7): running, $189.99 — The Ultraboost 22 is built for runners who want performance and style in one package.
- [Brooks Ghost 15](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=8): running, $139.99 — The Brooks Ghost 15 is a trusted daily trainer built for neutral runners who want a smooth, balanced ride.
- [ASICS Gel-Nimbus 25](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=9): running, $159.95 — The ASICS Gel-Nimbus 25 delivers exceptional comfort for long-distance runners.
- [Timberland 6-Inch Premium Waterproof Boot](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=10): boots, $198.00 — The iconic Timberland boot, crafted with premium full-grain waterproof leather and sealed seams to keep your feet dry in any weather.

- [Thursday Boot Co. Captain Chelsea Boot](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=12): boots, $199.99 — The Captain Chelsea Boot from Thursday Boot Co.
- [Birkenstock Arizona Soft Footbed](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=13): sandals, $99.95 — The Birkenstock Arizona is the quintessential two-strap sandal — instantly recognizable and beloved worldwide.
- [Teva Original Universal Sandal](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=14): sandals, $55.00 — Born on the Colorado River in 1984, the Teva Original Universal is the adventure sandal that started it all.
- [Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product.html?id=15): sandals, $74.99 — The Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom combines style with serious comfort technology.

- [Product feed (JSON)](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/products.json): complete catalog, all fields.
